intent: Follow-up suggestion buttons after AI replies. Displays clickable next-question suggestions below assistant messages.

blacklist.description: Do not override styles matching pattern ^rounded
Do not override styles matching pattern ^(bg|text|border)-(muted|accent|background)

aiPrompt: Use FollowUpSuggestions from @/components/starter. Use semantic props for variant and size. Do not hardcode colors or spacing. Colors must use design token classes only.
